title: Hardcore Torches Addon: Recipe Reveal
description: This datapack enhances consistency and gameplay experience by implementing a criteria-based recipe unlock system that the Hardcore Torches mod lacks, a necessary feature for players with the doLimitedCrafting gamerule enabled.
body:
This datapack enhances consistency and gameplay experience by implementing a criteria-based recipe unlock system that the Hardcore Torches mod lacks, a necessary feature for players with the doLimitedCrafting gamerule enabled. It ensures players can view important Hardcore Torches mod recipes as soon as they acquire key items in their inventory.

Warning: This datapack was created to meet my personal needs. If something is not the way the user wants, fork this datapack; the source code is the final file distributed to the user.
